channel.title: Village Pond on Our Oakley
channel.description: Recent content in Village Pond on Our Oakley

item.title: Woodland Wellbeing Walk
item.description:
Woodland wellbeing walk led by Barbara. Meeting at Village Pond, East Oakley.

Pace: gentle
Duration: 1 hour approx
Routes: varied
Led by Barbara

item.title: Carols at the Pond
item.description:
Much-loved village carol singing with the community, attended by the Mayor of Basingstoke and Deane. Taking place at Village Pond, East Oakley.

Donations support local groups and organisations.

Join us for this cherished annual tradition as we gather around the village pond for festive carol singing. A wonderful community event that brings everyone together to celebrate the Christmas season.

item.title: Oakley Woodland Wellbeing Walks
item.description:
☕️ Finishing with a sociable cuppa @ Methodist Chapel ☕️

Pace: gentle

Duration: 1 hour approx

Routes: varied

Led by Barbara
